title: sideritis incana subsp. incana
intro: Sideritis incana subsp. incana, also known as Incan Sideritis, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is a member of the mint family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis incana subsp. incana include its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. Sideritis incana subsp. incana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
